required_skills: Operations Performance Analysis and KPI Management
Root Cause Analysis and Problem Solving
Advanced Microsoft Excel and Data Modeling
responsibilities: Analyze operational performance metrics and business processes to identify inefficiencies and recommend measurable process improvement initiatives.
Develop executive dashboards and performance reports that provide visibility into operational KPIs, productivity trends, and service levels.
Conduct root cause analysis on operational issues and implement data-driven recommendations that improve efficiency and reduce process bottlenecks.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to gather requirements, evaluate workflows, and optimize operational procedures across departments.
Build analytical models using operational data to forecast resource needs, capacity utilization, and business performance outcomes.
Monitor process compliance and operational standards to ensure consistent execution and achievement of organizational objectives.
Prepare detailed business analyses and presentations that support strategic decision-making and continuous improvement programs.
Implement reporting automation solutions that reduce manual effort and improve data accuracy across operational functions.
